title: campium heteroclitum
intro: Campium heteroclitum, also known as creeping thyme, is a low-growing, spreading herb native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Campium heteroclitum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Campium heteroclitum typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from the plant's leaves and flowers.
